TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ron_Anderson, title = Ron_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ron_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Ron Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1958, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 10, Ron Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ron Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1958, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 10, Ron Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ron an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ron an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
